name: Duo Memberships With Inactive Users
description: Detects Duo group memberships that still reference inactive users.
query: SELECT m.group_id, m.user_id FROM duo_group_memberships m JOIN duo_users u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE NOT (LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded'))
remediation: Remove inactive users from all groups and verify deprovisioning workflows are complete.
